시편 122:1.content: I was glad when they said to me, “Let’s go to Yahweh’s house!”

시편 122:2.content: Our feet are standing within your gates, Jerusalem,

시편 122:3.content: Jerusalem, that is built as a city that is compact together,

시편 122:4.content: where the tribes go up, even Yah’s tribes, according to an ordinance for Israel, to give thanks to Yahweh’s name.

시편 122:5.content: For there are set thrones for judgment, the thrones of David’s house.

시편 122:6.content: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem. Those who love you will prosper.

시편 122:7.content: Peace be within your walls, and prosperity within your palaces.

시편 122:8.content: For my brothers’ and companions’ sakes, I will now say, “Peace be within you.”

시편 122:9.content: For the sake of the house of Yahweh our God, I will seek your good.
